calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Sep-02-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Vanessa Sundin, Esq., counsel for Kathleen McDonagn, Petitioner (appearing telephonically).

The Court notes at the outset that the Petition seeks to quiet title which is governed entirely by the Code of Civil Procedure and must proceed in civil court. Additionally, the Court has reservations as to whether Probate Code Sec. 850 is applicable. Ms. Sundin responds, noting the general history of the asset - a corporation - and that ultimately, the contention is that the corporation is a trust asset where in Probate Code Sec. 850 is would be appropriate. After further discussion, the Court is inclined to agree but will take the matter under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Mar-13-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Evan Winet Kathleen McDonough; Bobby Lam for William McDonough III.

In response to an inquiry from the Court, Mr. Lam confirmed that no objection had been or would be filed to the relief requested in the petition. The Court stated that while he was tentatively willing to grant the petition, the order would need modification to delete the reference to "other intangible property", as such provision was too vague. Mr. Winet submitted a revised order. The Court granted the petition confirming trust assets, subject to review of the order and deletion of the reference to other intangible property.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)
